title: Taatem of undying
description: This texture-pack adds a 3D totem in the form of a Taa caterpillar. He also renames it the "Taatem of undying".
body:
**This texture-pack add 3D totem in the form of a Taa caterpillar.
The texture pack changes the name of the totem.**

**supported languages:**
- English(US)
- Русский(Россия)
